title: Estimation Workflow for Common Time Series Models
description: A flowchart outlining the key estimation results, methods, and considerations for AR, MA, and ARMA models.
relationships: Starts with Model Identification which informs the choice of Estimation Method
Estimation Method produces the Estimated Parameters
Estimated Parameters are validated through Model Diagnostics
If diagnostics fail, loop back to Model Identification
Validated model is used for Forecasting
